title: [TOOL] A Cost-Effective API for Backtesting & Algotrading with GPT-5 Pro, Claude 4.1, and 400+ Models (Pay-As-You-Go)
author: Repulsive-Monk1022
selftext:
I wanted to share a platform I've found incredibly useful for my own trading-related projects, especially for anyone who gets frustrated with the high, fixed costs of API access for powerful models.

The platform is called **NanoGPT**, and it's basically a single access point to over 400 AI models on a pay-as-you-go basis. This is a game-changer for developing and testing trading strategies.

**How this is relevant for AI trading:**

* **Pay-As-You-Go API:** This is the biggest win. Instead of a $20/month subscription, you only pay for what you actually use. You can start with a deposit as low as $0.10. It's perfect for the sporadic, high-intensity usage common in backtesting or running analysis scripts.
* **Powerful Models for Strategy & Code:** You get API access to the best models for reasoning and coding, like **GPT-5 Pro**, **Claude 4.1 Opus 4.5 Sonnet**, and various **Qwen Coder** models. I've used it for:
   * Generating Python scripts for market data analysis.
   * Debugging trading bots.
   * Brainstorming quantitative strategy ideas.
* **Privacy for Proprietary Strategies:** This is critical. NanoGPT does not store your prompts or conversations on their servers; everything is saved locally on your device. This means your proprietary algorithms and strategies stay confidential.
* **Unified API Access:** You can access models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more through a single endpoint, which simplifies integration into custom trading dashboards or scripts.

**Get a 5% Discount:**

You'll get a **permanent 5% discount** on all your usage. [Link](https://nano-gpt.com/invite/xzrVY44A)
